info.title: Stationary Server API
info.description: All API endpoints for the Stationary backend service, supporting export to tools like Apifox / Postman.

get.summary: List all API tokens of the current user
Get AI embedding and description config for the media library

post.summary: Modify AI embedding and description config for the media library

get.summary: List all tags under the media library (with stats and aliases)
Get author list in the media library

post.summary: Update Post info (title, description, published time, etc.)
Permanently delete Media and its files

get.summary: Get MPEG-DASH MPD playlist for video
List all playback tracks under Media

post.summary: Get S3 presigned URL for uploading track
Register/replace specified track and associate physical file
Replace physical file association of specified track
Start batch data synchronization and import task
Retry tasks that failed to synchronize
Clean up deleted but expired files
Scan videos with missing covers and re-enqueue
Clean up and recover stuck tasks
Clean up orphan tags under the media library
Upstash Workflow webhook endpoint for processing main task
Webhook endpoint for video cover extraction workflow
Webhook endpoint for AI vector/description workflow
Webhook endpoint for cross-library avatar copy workflow
Sign up with email and password
Sign in with email and password
Safely sign out current account and invalidate session

BearerAuth.description: Authenticate requests using API token (Authorization: Bearer <token>)
